releaseNotes:
📢 CineMovie v0.8.0

This update brings the first version of Android TV support and the new offline download feature.

Changes:
📥 Offline video downloader is now available.
📺 Android TV Mode v1 with D-pad navigation and TV-friendly layouts.
🔄 Mobile and Android TV now use the same APK (no separate TV version).
⚡️ Performance improvements and bug fixes.

Still being worked on:
🚧 Some Settings pages and Statistics cards are still incomplete and will be finished in future updates.
📺 Android TV support is still in its first version, so you may encounter some issues while it's being improved.

If you find any bugs or have feedback, let me know.
